text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm out shopping...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Gah! Decisions, decisions! Which one<n>should I
get?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Should I get the limited-edition Flavor<n>Explosion
Chips?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Or should I grab the Sweetie Pie<n>Chocolate Bar
that I already know I<n>love?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Uuugh, it's impossible to pick! Which<n>snack am I
supposed to eat after<n>school today?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hey, what do you think I should<n>choose?!
choice_data_list: You gotta go with the new flavor.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Right?! What's even the point if I'm<n>not doing
something exciting?! ♪ I'm<n>not great with spice,
but I gotta at least<n>try!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun's method of<n>choosing snacks
might be a good<n>approach to running too.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yeeeah, I get you. Gotta stick with<n>what you
know when it comes to<n>snacks.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Besides, it's such a bummer when<n>you try
something new and it sucks!<n>Okay, then this one
it is!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hm, hm, hmmm! ♪ I can't wait for<n>school to be
over! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun's method of<n>choosing snacks
might be a good<n>approach to running too.
